title: astragalus albiflorus
intro: Astragalus albiflorus, also known as white milk vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Astragalus albiflorus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and enhancing cardiovascular health. Astragalus albiflorus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried root, capsule, or tea, and is often used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
